name: Jaelin Garcia
ai_summary: Jaelin Garcia from Gilbert, AZ has over 5 years of professional childcare experience including gymnastics coaching, ABA therapy, and nanny work with children aged 2-6. She is passionate about child development, skilled in conflict resolution for neurodivergent children, and seeking flexible part-time to full-time work Monday through Friday.
